## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link related issues. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go test -race ./tests/integration -count=1` passes (if logic changed)
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in `README.md` / `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or production data added

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, perf measurements. -->
